Here are the files and directories in the current working directory (`/home/my-vibe`):

```
.               - current directory
..              - parent directory
.gitignore      - Git ignore rules
.venv           - Python virtual environment
Cargo.lock      - Cargo dependency lock file
Cargo.toml      - Cargo project metadata
Makefile        - build instructions
dist            - distribution build artifacts
node_modules    - npm package dependencies
package-lock.json
package.json    - npm project metadata
pyproject.toml  - Python project metadata
src             - source code directory
target          - Rust build output
test_a.js       - test file
test_index.js   - another test file
tsconfig.json   - TypeScript configuration
uv.lock         - Python dependency lock file
```

Feel free to ask for details on any of these files or for further operations.
